member.name: T:Foundatio.Queues.QueueMessageEnvelope`1
member.summary: Envelope for wrapping queue data with metadata (correlation id, properties). Azure Storage Queue only supports a message body, so we serialize this entire envelope.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Queues.AzureStorageQueueEntry`1.PopReceipt
member.summary: The current pop receipt for this message. This gets updated after each UpdateMessageAsync call (renew lock, abandon with retry delay).

member.name: T:Foundatio.Queues.AzureStorageQueueCompatibilityMode
member.summary: Compatibility mode for Azure Storage Queue message format.

member.name: F:Foundatio.Queues.AzureStorageQueueCompatibilityMode.Default
member.summary: Default mode: Uses message envelope for full metadata support. Supports CorrelationId and Properties. New installations should use this mode.

member.name: F:Foundatio.Queues.AzureStorageQueueCompatibilityMode.Legacy
member.summary: Legacy mode: Raw message body with Base64 encoding for v11 SDK compatibility. Use this for backward compatibility with existing queues that have messages written with the v11 Microsoft.Azure.Storage.Queue SDK.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Queues.AzureStorageQueueOptions`1.DequeueInterval
member.summary: The interval to wait between polling for new messages when the queue is empty.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Queues.AzureStorageQueueOptions`1.RetryDelay
member.summary: A function that returns the delay before retrying a failed message based on the attempt number. Default is exponential backoff with jitter: 2^attempt seconds + random 0-100ms.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Queues.AzureStorageQueueOptions`1.CompatibilityMode
member.summary:
Controls message format compatibility. Default mode uses an envelope wrapper that supports CorrelationId and Properties. Legacy mode is provided for backward compatibility with existing queues that have messages written with the v11 Microsoft.Azure.Storage.Queue SDK (uses Base64 encoding and raw payload).
Default: AzureStorageQueueCompatibilityMode.Default (envelope with metadata)
Migration from v11 SDK:
Set CompatibilityMode = Legacy to read existing v11 messages
Process all existing messages from the queue
Once queue is empty, switch to CompatibilityMode = Default
All new messages will use envelope format with metadata support

member.name: P:Foundatio.Queues.AzureStorageQueueOptions`1.ConfigureRetry
member.summary: Optional action to configure Azure SDK retry options. Default Azure SDK retry settings: MaxRetries=3, Delay=0.8s, MaxDelay=1min, Mode=Exponential.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Queues.AzureStorageQueueOptionsBuilder`1.RetryDelay(System.Func{System.Int32,System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Sets a custom retry delay function for failed messages.
member.param: A function that takes the attempt number and returns the delay before the next retry.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Queues.AzureStorageQueueOptionsBuilder`1.CompatibilityMode(Foundatio.Queues.AzureStorageQueueCompatibilityMode)
member.summary: Sets the message format compatibility mode. See for migration guidance.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Queues.AzureStorageQueueOptionsBuilder`1.ConfigureRetry(System.Action{Azure.Core.RetryOptions})
member.summary: Configures Azure SDK retry options for transient failure handling.

member.name: P:Foundatio.Storage.AzureFileStorageOptions.ConfigureRetry
member.summary: Optional action to configure Azure SDK retry options. Default Azure SDK retry settings: MaxRetries=3, Delay=0.8s, MaxDelay=1min, Mode=Exponential.

member.name: M:Foundatio.Storage.AzureFileStorageOptionsBuilder.ConfigureRetry(System.Action{Azure.Core.RetryOptions})
member.summary: Configures Azure SDK retry options for transient failure handling.
